summary: Completed comprehensive testing of P6 Historical Backtest implementation. All backtest APIs are fully functional with accurate metrics computation and proper data storage.
passed_tests: Backtest run for BTC (4H timeframe, 120 days)
Backtest data storage validation with mode=historical_backtest
Resolution data structure validation (result, resolution_type, actual_price, error_pct)
Expected accuracy rates validation (2.8% accuracy, 33.3% partial, 63.9% wrong)
Bearish bias detection in backtest results
Backtest metrics computation with real historical data
